dict.string:
-- Alfred-Ghostty Quick Terminal integration -- Uses Ghostty 1.3.0+ native AppleScript dictionary
on alfred_script(query) tell application "Ghostty" activate delay 0.3
-- Snapshot terminal IDs before toggle set idsBefore to {} repeat with t in every terminal set end of idsBefore to id of t end repeat
-- Collect terminal IDs owned by windows set windowTermIds to {} repeat with w in every window set ft to focused terminal of selected tab of w set end of windowTermIds to id of ft end repeat
-- Open the quick terminal set term to focused terminal of selected tab of front window perform action "toggle_quick_terminal" on term delay 0.5
-- Find the quick terminal: either a newly created terminal -- or the orphan not belonging to any window set qt to missing value repeat with t in every terminal set tid to id of t -- Check if this terminal is new (created by toggle) set isNew to true repeat with bid in idsBefore if tid = (contents of bid) then set isNew to false exit repeat end if end repeat if isNew then set qt to t exit repeat end if -- Check if this terminal is an orphan (not in any window) set inWindow to false repeat with wid in windowTermIds if tid = (contents of wid) then set inWindow to true exit repeat end if end repeat if not inWindow then set qt to t exit repeat end if end repeat
if qt is not missing value then input text query to qt delay 0.1 send key "enter" to qt end if end tell end alfred_script
